metadata.description: Agent skills distilled from real-world usage. First up: codex-implementation-loop — delegate implementation to Codex while keeping review, test-gating, and shipping judgment in Claude's hands.

plugins.name: codex-implementation-loop
plugins.description: A review-gated implementation loop: dispatch coding units to Codex (codex-companion runtime), review the diff, iterate on the same thread, gate on the full test suite, then ship as a PR. Encodes hard-won environment constraints (read-only git, no full-suite runs, stuck-job handling) and six user-configurable dials.
